options.name: -gen_hier_file
options.description: Generates hier ports fanin/fanout file when the database is available based on the given InstanceName_list.

options.name: -load_hier_file
options.description: Uses a previously saved hier ports fanin/fanout file when the database is not available.

options.name: -master
options.description: Specifies that the timing paths should be categorized only for the specified master category.

options.name: -out_file
options.description: Specifies the generated hier ports fanin/fanout file name.
